page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-360 is a high-density general-purpose server powered by the x86_64 AMD EPYC 9B14 processor. It features 360 dedicated vCPUs, derived from 180 physical cores with 2 threads per core. The system is equipped with 1440.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. There is no bundled local storage or GPU hardware included with this instance type.

Benchmark results place this instance in the top tier for multi-core CPU performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 554,304.29 and a PassMark CPU score of 157,237.28. Memory bandwidth is exceptionally high, reaching 26,997.36 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 697.13 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. The platform also demonstrates top-tier performance in database operations, static web serving throughput at 160.75 GB/sec, and Redis SET operations at 414.29 million operations per second.

For advanced workloads, the processor supports AVX-512 and cryptographic acceleration, including AES, VAES, and SHA_NI. It achieves top-tier results in LLM inference prompt processing across small, medium, and large models, as well as software compilation and ray tracing. Given its massive resource density and high multi-core efficiency, the instance offers high qualitative cost efficiency for highly parallelized, compute-intensive enterprise workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or discrete GPU acceleration.
This instance is highly suited for large-scale database hosting, high-throughput web serving, software compilation pipelines, and CPU-based machine learning or LLM inference tasks.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-360 is a high-density general-purpose instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with 360 dedicated vCPUs and 1440.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the x86_64 architecture, this server delivers top-tier multi-core performance, as evidenced by its stress-ng multi-core score of 554,304.29 and a PassMark CPU score of 157,237.28. It features exceptional memory bandwidth, reaching 697.13 GB/sec for uncached large blocks, and excels in high-throughput tasks like static web serving and Redis operations. The hardware includes cryptographic and vector extensions but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. This configuration is highly efficient for massive parallel processing, software compilation, database operations, and CPU-based LLM inference.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-360 features 360 AMD EPYC vCPUs and 1440 GB RAM, delivering top-tier multi-core compute and memory bandwidth for enterprise databases and parallel workloads.

tagline: A high-density, multi-core compute platform offering massive memory bandwidth and exceptional parallel processing performance for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with 360 dedicated vCPUs and 1440 GB RAM
Top-tier multi-core performance and memory bandwidth exceeding 690 GB/sec
Excellent throughput for Redis operations and static web serving
Supports AVX-512, cryptographic acceleration, and CPU-based LLM inference
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Best suited for large-scale databases, software compilation, and parallel computing
